data.title: UK Officer Stole $6M Bitcoin in Silk Road 2.0 Case — What It Means for SHIB
data.description:
Summary: What happened in the Silk Road 2. 0 case involving ex-NCA officer Paul Chowles? Paul Chowles, a former UK crime investigator, stole 50 Bitcoin during the Silk Road 2. 0 probe. He laundered the funds through a crypto mixer and cashed out nearly $757,000
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/07/18/uk-officer-stole-6m-bitcoin-in-silk-road-2-0-case-what-it-means-for-shib/

data.title: Volcon Just Went Full Bitcoin—Stock Explodes 135% After Treasury Pivot
data.description:
Volcon, the innovative electric vehicle company, has just made a significant shift in its financial strategy by fully embracing Bitcoin as part of its operations. As a result of this bold move, the company's stock has experienced a remarkable surge, skyrocketing by an impressive 135% following a strategic pivot announced by the Treasury. This development not only highlights Volcon's commitment to staying at the forefront of the rapidly evolving cryptocurrency landscape but also signals growing investor confidence in the company's future prospects amid changing economic dynamics.
source: https://blocknews.com/volcon-just-went-full-bitcoin-stock-explodes-135-after-treasury-pivot/

data.title: OKX's net inflow of ETH exceeded $2 million in the past hour
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News OKLink chain data shows that in the past hour, the OKX trading platform has inflowed about 3.8 million US dollars of ETH, outflow amount is 1.76 million US dollars, and net inflow exceeds 2.04 million US dollars. More than 90% of the funds come from non-exchange addresses on the chain, indicating that users actively transfer ETH to the platform, which may be related to the strengthening of market sentiment.
According to OKX market data, ETH continued to rise today, breaking through 3674 US dollars in a short time, and the increase in 24 hours exceeded 7%. Since the low of 1384 US dollars on April 9, 2025, the cumulative rebound has exceeded 165%, and the current price is about 24% away from the historical high of 4871 US dollars.

data.title: Smart Money Invests Heavily in Ethereum After Previous Bitcoin Success
data.description:
According to PANews, a savvy investor known for profiting $5. 16 million by shorting Bitcoin during the LUNA/UST collapse has recently made a significant purchase of 2,172 ETH, valued at $7. 46 million, with an average buying price of $3,437. This move comes six months after their last major activity
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/27092391721409?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Fidelity's Jurrien Timmer Compares Bitcoin Growth to Internet Expansion
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Jurrien Timmer, the Global Macro Director at Fidelity, has drawn parallels between Bitcoin's growth and the rise of the internet. Timmer highlighted that Bitcoin's growth trajectory closely mirrors the adoption curve of the internet over the past few decades. Timmer noted that Bitcoin continues to follow a power-law curve in terms of wallet numbers, aligning with a demand model he developed based on internet adoption rates. He suggested that Bitcoin is currently in the middle phase of this growth curve
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/27092087094386?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: MEI Pharma Launches $100 Million Litecoin Treasury Strategy
data.description: According to Foresight News, Nasdaq-listed MEI Pharma has announced the launch of a $100 million Litecoin treasury strategy. This initiative marks a significant move by the company into the cryptocurrency space, reflecting a growing trend among corporations to diversify their financial strategies with digital assets.

data.title: Smart Money Invests Heavily in Ethereum After Previous Bitcoin Success
data.description: According to PANews, a savvy investor known for profiting $5.16 million by shorting Bitcoin during the LUNA/UST collapse has recently made a significant purchase of 2,172 ETH, valued at $7.46 million, with an average buying price of $3,437. This move comes six months after their last major activity. Previously, this account had successfully capitalized on Bitcoin and Wrapped Bitcoin (WBTC) investments, earning $7.41 million, and had also gained $3.02 million from Ethereum investments.

data.title: Fidelity's Jurrien Timmer Compares Bitcoin Growth to Internet Expansion
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Jurrien Timmer, the Global Macro Director at Fidelity, has drawn parallels between Bitcoin's growth and the rise of the internet. Timmer highlighted that Bitcoin's growth trajectory closely mirrors the adoption curve of the internet over the past few decades.

Timmer noted that Bitcoin continues to follow a power-law curve in terms of wallet numbers, aligning with a demand model he developed based on internet adoption rates. He suggested that Bitcoin is currently in the middle phase of this growth curve.

The analysis indicates that Bitcoin's current price pattern, characterized by 'stair-step increases and consolidation,' reflects its status as a maturing yet unsaturated asset class.

Regarding the influx of capital into Bitcoin, Timmer remarked that it remains uncertain whether these funds are from long-term believers or short-term speculators.

data.title: The top-ranked user of the Binance Trading Alliance team closed a 10x ETH short position, losing $2.763 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to the monitoring of Ai Yi, an on-chain analyst, the contract user "If I Don't Understand", who ranked first in the Binance Trading Alliance Team Competition, has just closed all his positions at a loss. The opening price was US$3,406.8 and the average closing price was US$3,654.19. In the end, his ETH 10x short position lost US$2.763 million.

data.title: OpenAI to Utilize Google Cloud for ChatGPT Services
data.description: According to PANews, OpenAI has announced plans to operate ChatGPT on Google Cloud services. Previously reliant on Microsoft's Azure cloud services, this move marks a significant step as the company aims to reduce its dependence on Microsoft. As per OpenAI's 'sub-processor list,' Google Cloud will support ChatGPT's enterprise, education, team, and API services, catering to users in the United States, United Kingdom, Japan, Norway, and the Netherlands. Regular users may not notice whether they are accessing ChatGPT through Google Cloud.

data.title: ZachXBT Highlights Challenges in Evaluating Crypto Traders' Performance
data.description: According to PANews, blockchain investigator ZachXBT shared insights on the X platform regarding the evaluation of crypto traders. He emphasized that he focuses on traders who have consistently performed well over the long term, such as HighstakesCapital, as their public profit and loss records are difficult to falsify. However, he noted that many of these traders no longer share their perspectives. ZachXBT stressed the importance of longevity, pointing out that numerous crypto influencers create new accounts or avoid transparency after experiencing high-leverage losses or lucky gains. He also mentioned that 95% of traders on crypto platforms primarily profit from selling courses and paid group memberships, suggesting that following incompetent accounts can contribute to increased noise in the market.

data.title: ETH/BTC Exchange Rate Surges by 69% Since April
data.description: According to Foresight News, the exchange rate between Ethereum (ETH) and Bitcoin (BTC) has surpassed 0.03. This marks a significant increase of 69% from the rate of 0.01767 recorded on April 22. The rise in the ETH/BTC rate highlights the growing strength of Ethereum in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: IMF Compliance Goals for Bitcoin in El Salvador Face Challenges
data.description: According to Foresight News, the International Monetary Fund (IMF) and El Salvador's agreement on Bitcoin compliance goals is encountering obstacles. These objectives are designed to ensure macroeconomic stability and adherence to anti-money laundering regulations. Since its launch, the official cryptocurrency wallet, Chivo, has faced technical issues, cybersecurity concerns, and user dissatisfaction. Reports of wallet vulnerabilities have raised questions about the effectiveness of anti-money laundering and counter-terrorism financing measures. Failure to demonstrate compliance could jeopardize El Salvador's $1.3 billion loan from the IMF and affect the credibility and investment interest in the country's Bitcoin initiative.

data.title: Analysis: Three cryptocurrency bills may bring uncertainty to "DeFi platforms handling stablecoins", and more legislation will be introduced in the next few years to fill the gap
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Logan Payne, a lawyer specializing in the cryptocurrency field at Winston & Strawn Law Firm, analyzed the three cryptocurrency bills that are about to be signed and said that the GENIUS Act may bring uncertainty to how DeFi platforms handle stablecoins. "How GENIUS will affect DeFi, at least for now, we have deliberately left some unsolved mysteries, and there will still be a lot of uncertainty in the future, but in the overall policy environment, if this trend continues, we will gradually get some answers over time." Payne said, "There will be more legislation in the next few years, and some regulations will be introduced to fill some gaps in the DeFi field." (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Ethereum News: Ether Soars 47% in a Month as Hedge Funds Say $10K May Be “Stretch, But Not Impossible”
data.description: Key Takeaways:Ether is up 47% over the past 30 days, hitting $3,600 — its highest level since January.ZX Squared Capital says a rapid pullback is unlikely unless ETF inflows stall and Fed policy shifts.Analysts say a move to $10K is “ambitious but not impossible,” hinging on ETF momentum, staking, and broader Ethereum adoption.Ethereum’s native token ETH surged to $3,600 on Thursday, gaining over 47% in a month, as institutional flows and favorable macro conditions continue to drive market momentum.Despite the sharp rally, a rapid correction is unlikely, according to Felix Xu, partner at crypto hedge fund ZX Squared Capital. “All the hard data that arrived this week argues against a rapid reversal,” Xu told Cointelegraph.Xu pointed to two key drivers behind Ether’s strength:Record inflows into U.S. spot Ether ETFs, which saw $727 million in a single day this week.Ongoing uncertainty around Federal Reserve policy, particularly under pressure from U.S. President Donald Trump, who continues to call for aggressive interest rate cuts.“Unless both ETF inflows abruptly stall and the Fed turns sharply hawkish at the same time, the probability of a full retrace like the 30% wash-out of October 2024 looks low,” Xu added.Macro Support and ETF Demand Continue to Propel ETHEther is now trading near $3,609, up over 43% in the past 30 days, per Nansen data. Market participants attribute the surge not just to ETF demand, but also broader macro tailwinds and Ethereum’s growing role in decentralized finance infrastructure.Xu emphasized that spot ETH ETFs lock coins into cold storage, reducing selling pressure and tightening available supply. Combined with dovish policy expectations and strong investor sentiment, this creates a “low probability” for any immediate trend reversal.Is $10K ETH a Realistic Target?While some traders are eyeing ETH as high as $10,000 this year, Xu remains cautious.“A $10K target implies a 190% move in a little over five months — something ETH has achieved only during the 2017 ICO frenzy and the 2020–21 DeFi boom,” he said.Still, a surprise sprint to $10K can't be ruled out if several bullish engines fire in unison:Continued record ETF inflowsAddition of staking rewards to Ether ETFsReal-world adoption of Ethereum apps and Layer 2sBroader investor shift to risk-on assetsTrevor Koverko, co-founder of Sapien, echoed similar optimism:“It’s an ambitious move, but not impossible... ETH feels a lot less like a speculative bet now versus a programmable digital asset.”Analyst Forecasts DivergeWhile some traders such as Mikybull Crypto see Ether reaching $7,000–$10,000 based on RSI momentum, others view that target as dependent on multiple converging catalysts, not just price action.The consensus remains: As long as macro conditions and institutional flows remain supportive, Ether’s rally has room to run. But without sustained inflows or adoption triggers, a pause or short-term consolidation could follow, according to Cointelegraph.
